text:
Once upon a time, there was a curious little hedgehog named Holly. Holly lived in a small, cozy forest clearing that never really grew old. Every morning, Holly would wake up with a hoppy skip, munching on a juicy herb, and then go out exploring.

This particular day, Holly decided she wanted to find a secret lake that was said to have magical crystals at the bottom. Legend had it that shining these crystals would bring joy to any animal who gazed upon them through deep meditation.

Holly started her adventure cautiously, weaving through the whispering leaves. After a few minutes, she started seeing twinkling lights reflecting off the water's surface. Intrigued, Holly squished through some thick underbrush until she reached a quiet part of the forest where the glimmering lights were the most pronounced.

Her heart leaped with excitement! She rolled around in the bright spots just a bit too enthusiastically, inadvertently smashing an ancient tree branch. "Oh no!" she squeaked
